ddls:
CREATE TABLE "loans" (
  "loan_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each loan */,
  "loan_type" TEXT /* Type of loan (e.g., small, micro) */,
  "state" TEXT /* State where the business is located */,
  "business_type_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the type of business */,
  "race_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the race of the applicant */,
  "gender_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the gender of the applicant */,
  "veteran_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the veteran status of the applicant */,
  "non_profit" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the business is a non-profit */,
  "jobs_retained" INTEGER /* Number of jobs retained by the business */,
  "lender_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the lender */,
  "application_date" TEXT /* Date of loan application */,
  "approval_date" TEXT /* Date of loan approval */,
  "disbursement_date" TEXT /* Date of loan disbursement */,
  "loan_amount" REAL /* Amount of the loan */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the loan (e.g., pending, approved, disbursed, rejected) */,
  "loan_purpose" TEXT /* Detailed description of the purpose of the loan */,
  "interest_rate" REAL /* Interest rate of the loan */,
  "repayment_term" TEXT /* Repayment term of the loan in months or years */,
  "guaranteed_amount" REAL /* Amount of the loan that is guaranteed by the government */,
  "rejection_reason" TEXT /* Reason for rejection if the loan is rejected */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date and time when the loan record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("loan_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_loans_lender_id FOREIGN KEY ("lender_id") REFERENCES lenders ("lender_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_loans_race_id FOREIGN KEY ("race_id") REFERENCES races ("race_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_loans_gender_id FOREIGN KEY ("gender_id") REFERENCES genders ("gender_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_loans_veteran_id FOREIGN KEY ("veteran_id") REFERENCES veteran_status ("veteran_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_loans_business_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("business_type_id") REFERENCES business_types ("business_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "business_types" (
  "business_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each business type */,
  "business_type_name" TEXT /* Name of the business type (e.g., Corporation, Subchapter S Corporation) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the business type */,
  "tax_classification" TEXT /* Tax classification of the business (e.g., C-Corp, S-Corp, LLC) */,
  "industry" TEXT /* Industry in which the business operates (e.g., manufacturing, retail, services) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("business_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "races" (
  "race_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each race */,
  "race_name" TEXT /* Name of the race (e.g., White, Black, Asian) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the race */,
  "is_ethnicity_required" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating whether the ethnicity is required for the loan application */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("race_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "genders" (
  "gender_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each gender */,
  "gender_name" TEXT /* Name of the gender (e.g., Female, Male, Non-binary) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the gender */,
  "is_gender_required" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating whether the gender is required for the loan application */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("gender_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "veteran_status" (
  "veteran_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each veteran status */,
  "veteran_status_name" TEXT /* Name of the veteran status (e.g., Veteran, Non-Veteran) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the veteran status */,
  "service_branch" TEXT /* Branch of service (e.g., Army, Navy, Air Force) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("veteran_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "lenders" (
  "lender_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each lender */,
  "lender_name" TEXT /* Name of the lender */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the lender */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for the lender */,
  "contact_phone" TEXT /* Contact phone number for the lender */,
  "lender_type" TEXT /* Type of lender (e.g., bank, credit union, non-bank) */,
  "federal_id" TEXT /* Federal ID number of the lender */,
  "compliance_rating" TEXT /* Rating indicating the lender's compliance with regulations */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("lender_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "loan_applications" (
  "application_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each loan application */,
  "loan_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the loan */,
  "business_name" TEXT /* Name of the business */,
  "business_address" TEXT /* Address of the business */,
  "business_phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the business */,
  "business_email" TEXT /* Email address of the business */,
  "applicant_name" TEXT /* Name of the applicant */,
  "applicant_email" TEXT /* Email address of the applicant */,
  "applicant_phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the applicant */,
  "application_pdf" TEXT /* File path to the application PDF */,
  "recommended_by" TEXT /* Name of the person or organization that recommended the loan */,
  "application_status" TEXT /* Status of the application (e.g., submitted, reviewed, approved, rejected) */,
  "application_notes" TEXT /* Notes related to the application */,
  "application_source" TEXT /* Source of the application (e.g., website, referral, direct mail) */,
  "application_score" REAL /* Score indicating the quality of the application */,
  "reviewer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who reviewed the application */,
  "review_date" TEXT /* Date the application was reviewed */,
  "review_comments" TEXT /* Comments made by the reviewer during the review process */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("application_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_loan_applications_loan_id FOREIGN KEY ("loan_id") REFERENCES loans ("loan_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_loan_applications_reviewer_id FOREIGN KEY ("reviewer_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "loan_disbursements" (
  "disbursement_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each disbursement */,
  "loan_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the loan */,
  "disbursement_date" TEXT /* Date of the disbursement */,
  "disbursement_amount" REAL /* Amount of the disbursement */,
  "disbursement_method" TEXT /* Method of disbursement (e.g., wire transfer, check) */,
  "disbursement_status" TEXT /* Status of the disbursement (e.g., pending, completed) */,
  "disbursement_notes" TEXT /* Notes related to the disbursement */,
  "account_number" TEXT /* Bank account number to which the disbursement was made */,
  "transaction_id" TEXT /* Transaction ID for the disbursement */,
  "bank_name" TEXT /* Name of the bank that processed the disbursement */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("disbursement_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_loan_disbursements_loan_id FOREIGN KEY ("loan_id") REFERENCES loans ("loan_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "job_retention_reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each job retention report */,
  "loan_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the loan */,
  "report_date" TEXT /* Date of the job retention report */,
  "jobs_retained" INTEGER /* Number of jobs retained by the business */,
  "report_notes" TEXT /* Notes related to the job retention report */,
  "report_type" TEXT /* Type of report (e.g., monthly, quarterly, annual) */,
  "report_period_end" TEXT /* End date of the reporting period */,
  "verification_status" TEXT /* Status of the verification of the report (e.g., pending, verified) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_job_retention_reports_loan_id FOREIGN KEY ("loan_id") REFERENCES loans ("loan_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., applicant, lender, regulator) */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department the user belongs to */,
  "user_type" TEXT /* Type of user (e.g., admin, regular) */,
  "access_level" TEXT /* Access level of the user (e.g., read-only, read-write) */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date and time of the last login */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)
